title: NASA Moon Science
description: A NASA source card about lunar science, exploration, phases, surface features, and missions.
license: Public Domain / NASA Media Usage Guidelines

pages.text: NASA Moon resources explain lunar formation, phases, craters, surface conditions, exploration history, and current mission goals.
Use this source for students comparing observation from Earth with mission data from orbiters, landers, samples, and astronauts.
NASA materials are generally public domain as U.S. government work, but some images, partner resources, and logos have separate usage rules. Check item-level rights.
